name: Fall in Love Again
overview: Six years after being left at the altar and learning her fiancé, Lu Yunkai, is connected to her parents’ death, Zhou Mian returns as designer He Erxin. She joins his company, seeking revenge while uncovering the truth behind the accident. As secrets unravel, Zhou Mian must decide whether to pursue revenge or rekindle her love with Lu Yunkai.

trailers.title: 落水新娘惊艳归来开启复仇之旅，发誓要夺回属于她的一切 | 再见已是白月光 Fall in Love Again | 破镜重圆🌠与你重逢 | iQIYI青春剧场
